summary: Created product_system_design.md at ~/code/cirrus/ — hybrid PRD + SDD for executives explaining how CirrusTranslate works. Covers: product overview, 3 user journeys (Org/Translator/Client), end-to-end flows with diagrams, system architecture, data model, built vs not-built gap table, 3 key product decisions (auto-approval, messaging, self-assignment), and implementation phases. Rewrote Section 8 (Implementation Phases) to be brutally honest — each phase includes what could go wrong, realistic calendar times vs coding hours, and Phase 2 items split into high/medium/high-risk confidence buckets. Realistic total: 499-541 coding hours, 16-22 calendar weeks for 1 dev. Milestone 1 (live + usable) at 6-7 weeks. Also added Infrastructure section (36h) to refactor_proposal.md covering DO production app, domain DNS, email deliverability, RunPod endpoint separation, and ops readiness.
